meetJoinDescription: Find the person you are meeting nearby, join their session, and leave a shared record of being there together.

meetScanUnsupported: Scan meet is not available right now.

publisherFeatureFollowRequiresApprovalDe: Users must submit follow requests that you must approve before they can follow you.
publisherFeatureFollowRequiresApprovalHi: Enable this to review and approve follow requests manually.
publisherFeaturePostsRequireFollowDescri: Only users who have been approved as followers can see your posts.
publisherFeaturePostsRequireFollowHint: Enable this to restrict post visibility to approved followers only.
publisherFediverseAbout: The fediverse is a federated network of social platforms. Enabling this feature allows your publisher to interact with users across different ActivityPub-compatible services like Mastodon, PeerTube, and more.
publisherFediverseDescription: Configure your publisher's ActivityPub actor for federated social networking
publisherFediverseEnableHint: Enable your publisher to interact with fediverse

publisherQuotaInfoHint: Publisher slots are used when you create a publisher. If you have no available slots, you won't be able to create new publishers until. It does not limit the number of publishers you can collaberate with others.

socialCreditsDescription: Social Credit is a way for Solar Network to evaluate users. It is calculated based on their behavior and interactions. With a base score of 100, higher scores indicate a user's credibility within the community. Scores change over time to reflect a user's recent behavior. Users with higher credit ratings enjoy more benefits, while users with lower credit ratings may have some functionality restricted.
